name: Sign In Button
uri: POST /api/auth/login → POST /api/auth/refresh (client-side sequence; no page navigation on success)
notes: Submit button is disabled and label switches to 'Signing in...' while AuthContext.loading is true (AuthContext.jsx:51); controlled by context state, not local component state.
On form submit, calls AuthContext.login(email, password) which chains POST /api/auth/login then immediately POST /api/auth/refresh; only after both succeed does it set isAuthenticated=true.

BUG (FR-007): POST /api/auth/refresh returns {session:{userId,email,createdAt}} instead of {token,refreshToken}; AuthContext.login crashes unconditionally at line 75 with TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split') even when credentials are correct.

Two independent error surfaces render below the form: this.state.error (LoginForm catch, line 81) and this.context.error (AuthContext catch, line 88); both may appear simultaneously if the error propagates through both catch blocks.
